# RecruitnetP

The goal of RecruitNetP is to …

## Installation

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("EcologyR/RecruitNetP")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

## Citation

If using this package, please cite it:

``` r
citation("RecruitNetP")
Warning in citation("RecruitNetP"): could not determine year for 'RecruitNetP'
from package DESCRIPTION file
To cite package 'RecruitNetP' in publications use:

  Montesinos-Navarro A, Garrido J, Verdú M, Alcántara J,
  Rodriguez-Sanchez F (????). _RecruitNetP: Analysis of Recruitment
  Networks_. R package version 0.0.0.9000,
  <https://github.com/EcologyR/RecruitNetP>.

A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is

  @Manual{,
    title = {RecruitNetP: Analysis of Recruitment Networks},
    author = {Alicia Montesinos-Navarro and José Luis Garrido and Miguel Verdú and Julio M. Alcántara and Francisco Rodriguez-Sanchez},
    note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},
    url = {https://github.com/EcologyR/RecruitNetP},
  }
```

## Funding

The development of this software has been funded by Fondo Europeo de
Desarrollo Regional (FEDER) and Consejería de Transformación Económica,
Industria, Conocimiento y Universidades of Junta de Andalucía (proyecto
US-1381388 led by Francisco Rodríguez Sánchez, Universidad de Sevilla).

![](https://ecologyr.github.io/workshop/images/logos.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Amoladeras_cover`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/Amoladeras_cover.md)
  : Amoladeras cover data
- [`Amoladeras_int`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/Amoladeras_int.md)
  : Amoladeras interaction data
- [`RN_dims()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/RN_dims.md)
  : Basic network dimensions
- [`RN_heatmap()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/RN_heatmap.md)
  : Visualize a heatmap of the interactions matrix.
- [`RN_to_matrix()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/RN_to_matrix.md)
  : Convert field data to matrix format
- [`accum_curve()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/accum_curve.md)
  : Accumulation curve of network dimensions
- [`associndex()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/associndex.md)
  : Calculate different association indices considering different
  interaction types.
- [`canopy_service_test()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/canopy_service_test.md)
  : Identifies whether a species acts as depressing, enhancing or
  neutral
- [`check_cover()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/check_cover.md)
  : Check cover data format
- [`check_interactions()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/check_interactions.md)
  : Check interaction data format
- [`comm_subset()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/comm_subset.md)
  : Subset data from one study site
- [`comm_to_RN()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/comm_to_RN.md)
  : Combine cover data with interaction data.
- [`download_RN()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/download_RN.md)
  : Download RecruitNet database from Zenodo
- [`funtopol_rec()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/funtopol_rec.md)
  : Species functional role in the general recruitment network
- [`int_significance()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/int_significance.md)
  : Statistical significance of interactions
- [`link_completeness()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/link_completeness.md)
  : Estimates the completeness and coverage of the sampled interactions
- [`load_cover()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/load_cover.md)
  : Load canopy cover data from RecruitNet database
- [`load_interactions()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/load_interactions.md)
  : Load interaction data from RecruitNet database
- [`node_degrees()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/node_degrees.md)
  : Calculate width of canopy service and recruitment niches
- [`node_topol()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/node_topol.md)
  : calculates eigenvector centrality and the two measures of extended
  niche.
- [`recruitment_niche_test()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/recruitment_niche_test.md)
  : Recruitment niche: community-level effects on species recruitment
- [`remove_no_cover()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/remove_no_cover.md)
  : Remove species with no cover data
- [`test_data`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/test_data.md)
  : Test data
- [`topol_depre()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/topol_depre.md)
  : Summary and node-based information of species in loops and simple
  paths
- [`topol_fac()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/topol_fac.md)
  : summary and node-based information of species in loops and simple
  paths
- [`visu_funtopol_rec()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/visu_funtopol_rec.md)
  : visualize the functional topology of general recruitment networks
- [`visu_net()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/visu_net.md)
  : Graph of nodes and interactions
- [`visu_topol_depre()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/visu_topol_depre.md)
  : Allow the visualization of intransitivity loops of recruitment
  depression
- [`visu_topol_fac()`](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/reference/visu_topol_fac.md)
  : Allow the visualization of reciprocal facilitation

  network](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/articles/Completeness-of-the-recruitment-network.md):
- [The RecruitNet
  database](https://ecologyr.github.io/RecruitNetP/articles/The-RecruitNet-database.md):
